hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f .superman/context/size-classification.md ]; then level=$(grep -o "Overall Level: [SML]" .superman/context/size-classification.md | head -1 | grep -o "[SML]$"); [ "$level" = "L" ] && echo "[Superman] L-level requirement active — CI gates will be enforced at VERIFY phase"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -d .superman/context ] && [ ! -f .superman/context/requirements.md ]; then echo "[Superman] Reminder: use superman:size-classify to classify your next requirement"; fi'
